sections.paragraph:
Original: חבה

Transliteration: châbâh

Phonetic: khaw-bah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to withdraw, hide, hide oneself
    1. (Qal) to withdraw
    2. (Niphal) to hide oneself, remain hidden, withdraw

Origin: a primitive root [compare H2245]

TWOT entry: 590

Part(s) of speech: Verb
